title: "provideGraphWsBridge()"
description: "Build a dependency-light Nest provider for the focused WebSocket bridge token."
---

<!-- generated by website/scripts/gen-api-docs.mjs; do not edit -->

Build a dependency-light Nest provider for the focused WebSocket bridge token.

## Import

```ts
import { provideGraphWsBridge } from "@graphrefly/ts/adapters/nestjs/websockets";
```

## Signature

```ts
function provideGraphWsBridge(opts: GraphWsBridgeOptions<THost> = {}): NestProviderBinding<GraphWsBridge<THost>>
```

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `opts` | `GraphWsBridgeOptions<THost>` | Options that configure the helper. |

## Returns

A `NestProviderBinding<GraphWsBridge<THost>>` value.

## Example

```ts
import { provideGraphWsBridge } from "@graphrefly/ts/adapters/nestjs/websockets";
```

`packages/ts/src/adapters/nestjs/websockets.ts`
